channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former Katsina government aide investigated over alleged involvement in kidnapping syndicate
item.description: The Katsina State Government has confirmed that a former Senior Special Assistant on Community Development, Nura Aliyu Garwa, is currently under investigation over his alleged involvement in a kidnapp...

item.title: How a simple kitchen timer and the Pomodoro technique helped overcome procrastination
item.description: The article describes a personal account of long-term procrastination and difficulty starting everyday tasks, which persisted from childhood into adulthood. The writer explains how even simple actions...

item.title: Congress criticises Education Minister over CBSE on-screen marking glitches and demands accountability from government
item.description: The Congress party has strongly criticised the Central Government over reported technical glitches in the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) examination evaluation and post-result services sy...

item.title: Ottawa plans safety upgrades to lighting and pedestrian access around ByWard Market and downtown core
item.description: The City of Ottawa is moving forward with plans to enhance lighting and pedestrian infrastructure at key access points leading into the ByWard Market and the downtown core. The initiative is aimed at ...

item.description: The 34th Grand AdClash, held on May 14, 2026 at Robinsons Galleria in Quezon City, showcased the creativity and strategic skills of fourth-year Advertising and Public Relations students from the Polyt...

item.title: Ontario government challenges order to release documents on blue licence plate program under freedom-of-information request
item.description: The Ontario government led by Premier Doug Ford is taking legal action to prevent the release of internal documents related to its discontinued blue licence plate program. The case stems from a freedo...

item.title: The 1953 Hudson Hornet Sedan and Its Legacy in Early NASCAR History
item.description: The 1953 Hudson Hornet Sedan is widely regarded as one of the most influential American automobiles of the mid-20th century, particularly due to its success in early NASCAR racing. It represented the ...

item.title: Nigerian Navy Marks 70 Years, Credits Achievements to Divine Grace
item.description: The Nigerian Navy has celebrated its 70th anniversary with a strong reflection on its journey, achievements, and role in safeguarding the nation’s maritime security. Speaking during an interdenominati...

item.title: Lizzo denies accusations of disrespect towards Taylor Swift and Olivia Rodrigo amid social media backlash
item.description: Lizzo has responded firmly to online accusations suggesting she had been disparaging fellow pop stars Taylor Swift and Olivia Rodrigo, insisting that she has never spoken negatively about any artist. ...

item.title: Concerns raised over political pressure on nonprofits through investigations and donor-advised fund restrictions
item.description: The article examines concerns that political and legal pressure could be used to weaken or financially constrain nonprofit organizations in the United States. It focuses on the Southern Poverty Law Ce...

item.title: Zone 2 Police arrest nine suspects over truck diversion, recover goods worth N60m
item.description: The Zone 2 Police Command in Onikan, Lagos State, has arrested nine suspects linked to organised syndicates involved in diverting goods in transit and stealing cargo meant for lawful destinations. Acc...

item.title: Florence Pugh-led ‘The Midnight Library’ sparks major studio competition at Cannes Film Market
item.description: Florence Pugh’s upcoming fantasy drama “The Midnight Library” has become one of the most sought-after projects at the Cannes Film Market, attracting significant interest from several major Hollywood s...

item.title: Rosanna Schiaffino, Italian Actress and 1960s Cinema Star
item.description: Rosanna Schiaffino (1939–2009) was an Italian actress who became one of the notable figures of European cinema during the post-neorealist period, especially throughout the late 1950s and 1960s. She in...

item.title: PSX starts shortened trading week strongly as KSE-100 surges over 4,000 points amid improved global sentiment
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) began its shortened trading week on a strong bullish note on Monday, with the benchmark KSE-100 Index witnessing a significant intraday surge of more than 4,000 point...

item.title: 75-year-old Norfolk County resident dies in two-vehicle collision in Ontario
item.description: A 75-year-old resident of Norfolk County has died following a serious two-vehicle collision in Ontario. According to the report, emergency services responded to the crash scene after two vehicles were...

item.title: Huawei announces new chip design approach targeting 1.4-nanometer-class performance despite US sanctions
item.description: Huawei Technologies has announced a new chip design strategy that it says could deliver transistor density equivalent to 1.4-nanometer processes within the next five years, even as US export restricti...

item.title: At least 4 dead and 17 missing after collapse of unfinished hotel in the Philippines
item.description: Rescue operations are underway in the Philippines after an unfinished hotel building collapsed, leaving at least four people dead and 17 others still missing. Authorities report that most of those una...

item.title: Farage faces scrutiny over undeclared £5m gift as Reform UK alleges Russian-linked cyberattack
